headline: Brooke Norton
body: Understand Genoa's Brooke Norton-Cuffy is valued at €20m this summer. Interest from Serie A, while Everton explored a deal in January.🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿
raw_text:
Understand Genoa's Brooke Norton-Cuffy is valued at €20m this summer.

Interest from Serie A, while Everton explored a deal in January.🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿
